### Available Sizes

$14.99

### Product Information

- Chemical resistant spray bottle

- Translucent tank and indicator levels

- 1 Liter (35 oz) usable total capacity

- Strong base for stability

- Adjustable spray nozzle

- Product Code: 84170

- [Read full description](#product-description)

### Customer Reviews

40% of customers said that they would buy this item again

[Based upon 5 ratings](#product-reviews)

### Product Description

When you pick up the IK Multi TR 1 Trigger Sprayer you instantly know this is a refined sprayer you will own for a long time. This bottle has been specially developed for the rigors of daily use and the atomizer is made of high-quality materials that are very resistant to most chemicals such as acids, alkalines and degreasers, etc. The plastic is strong and has a commercial-grade translucent tank with a level indicator, perfect for easy dilution of your favorite detailing chemicals. The adjustable nozzle allows you to spray anywhere from a tight stream to a wide mist for the exact right application. Utilizing the 1 Liter (35 oz) total capacity provides you with plenty of storage for window cleaners, interior cleaners, mild degreasers, mild wheel cleaners, etc. The strong and well-balanced base of this unit ensures it will last a long time and greatly reduces the risk of any unwanted tipping. Step up your spray bottle game with the IK Multi TR 1 Trigger Sprayer!



**360 vs Standard** - The [Multi TR 1 360](https://www.detailedimage.com/IK-M111/Multi-TR-1-360-Trigger-Sprayer-P3301/1-L-S1/) features a flexible tube, designed to pull chemical out of the unit when used at any angle. The standard [Multi TR 1](https://www.detailedimage.com/IK-M111/Multi-TR-1-Trigger-Sprayer-P2319/1-L-S1/) does not feauture this flexible tube.



**Optimal Products:**



- Disinfectants, Neutral Products, Alcohols, Alkalis and Ketones


**Suitable:**



- Acids


If you are using Hydrocarbon-Based Solvents, Oils/Lubricants, Brake Cleaners, Petroleum By-Products, and Solvent-Based Pesticides reach for the [IK Multi HC TR 1 Trigger Sprayer for Hydrocarbons](https://www.detailedimage.com/IK-M111/Multi-HC-TR-1-Trigger-Sprayer-for-Hydrocarbons-P2320/1-L-S1/)

### Videos

#### IK Trigger Sprayers

![image](https://img.youtube.com/vi/gmA6etErmGg/hqdefault.jpg)

### Customer Reviews

Reviewed by Nathan C. on 9/10/2021

[* DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

Overall, this is a nice spray bottle with a subpar trigger. Here is a list of pros & cons.

Pros: - High Build quality

-Thick Plastic means the bottle doesn't collapse on itself

-Can be dropped and the thicker black plastic frame will take the hit

- Clear markings on the side for precise measurements

-One pull of the trigger will spray at least double of other bottles to cover more area

Cons: - Takes a few sprays to get chemical up if bottle isn't used often

-Trigger is held on with two raised bumps which isn't secure. I had a trigger already break from there.

-Label included with bottles is useless, falls out & doesn't stay in place.

-Wide base sometimes makes storage difficult since it takes up more space at the bottom.

That's it, overall, considering only 1 of about 8 bottles has broken so far, I'd still recommend this sprayer over others, less trigger pulls means more coverage and less fatigue. Replacement triggers would be nice as the warranty process seems to be lengthy.

Reviewed by Michael C. on 6/15/2021

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

This is the Cadillac of sprayers. Everything on it is just top quality and you can tell by the trajectory and particles when spraying it that it's a really good product. Above the rest.

Reviewed by saul v. on 11/3/2021

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **No**

I would not buy again only due to the ergo of the sprayer. It digs in between your thumb and finger and it gets heavy and have to switch hands. I think if this didn't come out during the pandemic, they would have another choice. Other than that bottle size and material is good.
